prompt: Create a warm photorealistic lifestyle food photograph of a cozy Japanese café table in golden afternoon light, with cute hand-drawn doodles overlaid in white, yellow, and pink marker. The scene shows exactly 5 edible/drink items on a wooden tray: 1 large strawberry shaved ice dessert in a clear glass bowl as the centerpiece, topped with whipped cream and a fresh strawberry, with red syrup crystals cascading down one side; 1 striped ceramic cup of tea on the left; 1 small bowl holding a pink peach-shaped sweet in front-left; 1 tall iced lemon drink with straw and mint on the right; and 1 caramel custard pudding on a patterned saucer in front-right, topped with whipped cream and a strawberry. Add exactly 4 kawaii smiling faces with blush: on the shaved ice, tea cup, lemon slice in the drink, and pudding. In the softly blurred background, include a vertical café banner reading かき氷. Overlay exactly 7 handwritten Japanese text annotations: large white headline 夏のかき氷 near the shaved ice, small round tag 氷 above the dessert, yellow cloud text 清涼一夏 near the left, white cloud text 美食で良い気分 upper right, yellow starburst text 週末チェックイン mid-right, pink cloud text "一口の価値があります" lower right, plus small decorative handwritten accents. Surround the food with cute doodled hearts, sparkles, arrows, stars, and playful motion marks, as if sketched on top of the photo. Use shallow depth of field, natural window light, amber tones, realistic textures, glossy ice, condensation on the drink glass, wooden tabletop, casual café interior bokeh, cheerful summer mood, high-resolution editorial food photography mixed with adorable doodle illustration.
